mapper.update: UPDATE ai_run_trace SET prompt_tokens = COALESCE(prompt_tokens, 0) + #{promptTokens}, completion_tokens = COALESCE(completion_tokens, 0) + #{completionTokens}, total_tokens = COALESCE(total_tokens, 0) + #{totalTokens}, model_call_count = COALESCE(model_call_count, 0) + 1, updated_at = NOW() WHERE run_id = #{runId}
